title: nothocissus acrantha
intro: Nothocissus acrantha, also known as the "Dragon's Blood Tree" or "Cocculus indicus", is a plant species native to India and other parts of Asia, which is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nothocissus acrantha include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and other sleep disorders. Nothocissus acrantha is commonly prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as a liquid extract, and can also be used in traditional Ayurvedic remedies such as decoctions and infusions.
